description_long: This is a four-tier industrial-style shelving unit constructed primarily from dark, weathered metal. The frame consists of two vertical side supports with four evenly spaced horizontal shelves, each shelf appearing to be made from the same metal as the frame. The shelves are open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of stored items. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, handles, or doors, and the structure is robust and angular. The finish is matte with visible signs of wear, giving it a rugged, urban appearance suitable for garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments. The open design maximizes storage space and makes it easy to place or retrieve objects from any direction.
description: A rugged, industrial metal shelving unit with four open shelves and a weathered matte finish. Its utilitarian design is ideal for urban garages or workshops.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and the four shelf edges stacked vertically.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all four open shelves and the full width of the unit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the narrow side and shelf edges.
description_view_3: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with all four shelves visible and no backing panel.
